---
title: "MB5370 Module 3 Workshop 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Assembly stats redbean

read took:

\*\* PROC_STAT(TOTAL) \*\*: real 6.622 sec, user 21.630 sec, sys 2.210 sec, maxrss 284344.0 kB, maxvsize 903716.0 kB

\*\* PROC_STAT(TOTAL) \*\*: real 43.767 sec, user 191.220 sec, sys 10.070 sec, maxrss 277812.0 kB, maxvsize 915288.0 kB

``` bash

#stats for amtp4.ctg.fa
#sum = 3639649, n = 120, ave = 30330.41, largest = 143809
#N50 = 48273, n = 23
#N60 = 36829, n = 32
#N70 = 28879, n = 43
#N80 = 22438, n = 57
#N90 = 13359, n = 79
#N100 = 2697, n = 120
#N_count = 0
#Gaps = 0
```

20x read stats:

``` bash
jc840494@rstudio2:~/redbean$ assembly-stats amtp4_20x.ctg.fa
stats for amtp4_20x.ctg.fa
sum = 6878955, n = 89, ave = 77291.63, largest = 3344242
N50 = 1764943, n = 2
N60 = 1764943, n = 2
N70 = 1764943, n = 2
N80 = 54425, n = 8
N90 = 23747, n = 28
N100 = 4477, n = 89
N_count = 0
Gaps = 0
```

flye small read

``` bash
jc840494@rstudio2:~/workshop2_assembly/flye/amtp4$ assembly-stats assembly.fastastats for assembly.fasta
sum = 5156284, n = 77, ave = 66964.73, largest = 368927
N50 = 120111, n = 15
N60 = 99421, n = 20
N70 = 73541, n = 26
N80 = 48300, n = 35
N90 = 31251, n = 48
N100 = 2777, n = 77
N_count = 0
Gaps = 0
```

fly large read

``` bash
jc840494@rstudio2:~/workshop2_assembly/flye/amtp4_20x$ assembly-stats assembly.fasta
stats for assembly.fasta
sum = 7482774, n = 54, ave = 138569.89, largest = 3378344
N50 = 1775265, n = 2
N60 = 1775265, n = 2
N70 = 113574, n = 3
N80 = 74047, n = 12
N90 = 44111, n = 25
N100 = 4044, n = 54
N_count = 0
Gaps = 0
```
